name: Beauty and Mr. Romantic
overview: A love story about an actress falls to the bottom overnight, and a producer's effort to try and get her back on her feet because he loves her. A cheerful family drama that reveals the truth of the case and restores love and justice through revenge and a family's desire going through confusion due to family conflicts.

trailers.title: [종합예고] 너는 그 약속을 기억할까? [미녀와 순정남] | KBS 방송
